'''鈭歾h-h-p''' ('''kazhahap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zilch|zilch]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-h-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zilch|zilch]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾h-h-p
|-
! Lemma
| kazhahap
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhahap|thizhahap]] || [[word:jizhahap|jizhahap]] || [[word:shizhahap|shizhahap]] || [[word:kizhahap|kizhahap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzhahap|thuthuzhahap]] || [[word:jujuzhahap|jujuzhahap]] || [[word:shushuzhahap|shushuzhahap]] || [[word:kukuzhahap|kukuzhahap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzhahap|thuzhahap]] || [[word:juzhahap|juzhahap]] || [[word:shuzhahap|shuzhahap]] || [[word:kuzhahap|kuzhahap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzhahap|thuzhahap]] || [[word:juzhahap|juzhahap]] || [[word:shuzhahap|shuzhahap]] || [[word:kuzhahap|kuzhahap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezhahap|thezhahap]] || [[word:jezhahap|jezhahap]] || [[word:shezhahap|shezhahap]] || [[word:kezhahap|kezhahap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozhahap|thothozhahap]] || [[word:jojozhahap|jojozhahap]] || [[word:shoshozhahap|shoshozhahap]] || [[word:kokozhahap|kokozhahap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozhahap|thozhahap]] || [[word:jozhahap|jozhahap]] || [[word:shozhahap|shozhahap]] || [[word:kozhahap|kozhahap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozhahap|thozhahap]] || [[word:jozhahap|jozhahap]] || [[word:shozhahap|shozhahap]] || [[word:kozhahap|kozhahap]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhahap|zhahap]] || [[word:zhahap|zhahap]] || [[word:zhahap|zhahap]] || [[word:zhahap|zhahap]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhahap|zhahap]] || [[word:zhahap|zhahap]] || [[word:zhahap|zhahap]] || [[word:zhahap|zhahap]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhahap|zhahap]] || [[word:zhahap|zhahap]] || [[word:zhahap|zhahap]] || [[word:zhahap|zhahap]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhahap|zhahap]] || [[word:zhahap|zhahap]] || [[word:zhahap|zhahap]] || [[word:zhahap|zhahap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙zhahap|th忙zhahap]] || [[word:j忙zhahap|j忙zhahap]] || [[word:sh忙zhahap|sh忙zhahap]] || [[word:k忙zhahap|k忙zhahap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazhahap|thathazhahap]] || [[word:jajazhahap|jajazhahap]] || [[word:shashazhahap|shashazhahap]] || [[word:kakazhahap|kakazhahap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazhahap|thazhahap]] || [[word:jazhahap|jazhahap]] || [[word:shazhahap|shazhahap]] || [[word:kazhahap|kazhahap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazhahap|thazhahap]] || [[word:jazhahap|jazhahap]] || [[word:shazhahap|shazhahap]] || [[word:kazhahap|kazhahap]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazhahap|shazhahap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazhahap|goshazhahap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazhahap|gokishazhahap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazhahapn眉|shazhahapn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazhahapnkn眉|goshazhahapnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhahapn眉|gokishazhahapn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazhahapsh毛|shazhahapsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazhahapnksh毛|goshazhahapnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazhahapsh毛|gokishazhahapsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhahapro|shazhahapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhahapnkro|goshazhahapnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhahapro|gokishazhahapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhahapmu|shazhahapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhahapnkmu|goshazhahapnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhahapmu|gokishazhahapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazhahapsher|shazhahapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazhahapnksher|goshazhahapnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazhahapsher|gokishazhahapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazhahapng|shazhahapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazhahapnkng|goshazhahapnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazhahapng|gokishazhahapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazhahapya|shazhahapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazhahapnkya|goshazhahapnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazhahapya|gokishazhahapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazhahapyam|shazhahapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazhahapnkyam|goshazhahapnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazhahapyam|gokishazhahapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhahapn眉sh毛|shazhahapn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhahapnkn眉sh毛|goshazhahapnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhahapn眉sh毛|gokishazhahapn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhahapn眉ro|shazhahapn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhahapnkn眉ro|goshazhahapnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhahapn眉ro|gokishazhahapn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhahapn眉mu|shazhahapn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhahapnkn眉mu|goshazhahapnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhahapn眉mu|gokishazhahapn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhahapsh毛n眉|shazhahapsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhahapnksh毛n眉|goshazhahapnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhahapsh毛n眉|gokishazhahapsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhahapsh毛ro|shazhahapsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhahapnksh毛ro|goshazhahapnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhahapsh毛ro|gokishazhahapsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhahapsh毛mu|shazhahapsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhahapnksh毛mu|goshazhahapnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhahapsh毛mu|gokishazhahapsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhahapron眉|shazhahapron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhahapnkron眉|goshazhahapnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhahapron眉|gokishazhahapron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhahaprosh毛|shazhahaprosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhahapnkrosh毛|goshazhahapnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhahaprosh毛|gokishazhahaprosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhahapromu|shazhahapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhahapnkromu|goshazhahapnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhahapromu|gokishazhahapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhahapmun眉|shazhahapmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhahapnkmun眉|goshazhahapnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhahapmun眉|gokishazhahapmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhahapmush毛|shazhahapmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhahapnkmush毛|goshazhahapnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhahapmush毛|gokishazhahapmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhahapmuro|shazhahapmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhahapnkmuro|goshazhahapnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhahapmuro|gokishazhahapmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|17228b0}}
